title: Ore Growth Compatibility+
description: A mod that aims to expand the compatibility of Ore Growth
body:
SET "ENABLE VANILLA RECIPES" TO FALSE IN THE ORE GROWTH CONFIG FILE

Contains compat for the default Ore Growth mod compat as well as:

- Progression Reborn*
- Spelunkery*
- Cinderscapes
- Eldritch End
- Enderite Mod
- Galosphere
- Jaden's Nether Expansion
- [Let's Do] Meadow
- Nature's Spirit
- things**

The drops for several mods and vanilla have been slightly rebalanced to have a chance to drop 1-3 of the material, with rarer materials such as diamonds and ancient debris having vastly reduced chances for more than 1 drop.

*Progression Reborn and Spelunkery have extended compatibility where mods will have their drops changed to PR or Spelunkery drops where available.

**things' gleaming ore is kinda buggy and i'm not 100% sure if it fully works, but I have no idea why it doesn't work fully.
